---
title: ESM in links
---

# ESM expressions in links

A link whose label is an evaluated expression:
[{dynamicLinkLabel()}](http://mysite.com)

A markdown link whose destination looks dynamic is NOT evaluated — the brace text is
literal URL text: [Click here]({dynamicUrl()})

The supported dynamic-URL form is JSX: <a href={dynamicUrl()}>Click here</a>

A dynamic wiki target is not supported — [[{someFilename()}]] is not a wiki-link;
use JSX <WikiLink target={someFilename()} /> instead.
